---
title: "Class 8: Breast Cancer Mini-Project"
author: "Dariana Becerra Guzman (A17506182)"
format: html
---

## Background

In today's class we will apply the methods and techniques clustering and PCA to help make sense of a real world breast cancer FNA biopsy data set. 

## Data Import

We start by importing our data. It is a CSV file sp we will use the `read.csv()` function. 

```{r}
read.csv("WisconsinCancer.csv")
```
